message:
feat(runtime): extend terminal writer with additional rendering paths

- Expand terminal writer with new output modes and escape sequence handling
- Sync beads issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-1q5.13","title":"E2E test: Full render pipeline golden-frame verification","description":"End-to-end test that: (1) Creates a terminal with known capabilities, (2) Builds a model state, (3) Renders through full pipeline (model -> view -> diff -> ANSI -> bytes), (4) Compares output bytes against golden checksums (BLAKE3). Covers 47+ scenarios from definition of done. Tests run on 5 terminal emulator configurations (xterm-256color, screen-256color, tmux-256color, kitty, alacritty). LOGGING SPEC: Full tracing subscriber active. Assert span hierarchy: render.frame -> diff.strategy_select -> ansi.present. Assert all structured fields present. Assert frame_time_histogram metric recorded. Deterministic: same seed produces identical output across runs.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:59:39.312288380Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:57.163604896Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","golden","ring1","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.13","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-1q5.14","title":"E2E test: Flicker-free sync bracket round-trip","description":"End-to-end test that captures actual terminal output (via PTY) and verifies: (1) Sync bracket open/close always paired, (2) No partial frame visible between brackets, (3) Fallback to cursor-hiding when sync brackets unavailable, (4) Resize during render does not corrupt output.  {"id":"bd-1q5.18","title":"Cx-everywhere for Ring 1 terminal I/O operations","description":"Every Ring 1 terminal I/O operation (read, write, flush, capability probe) takes &asupersync::Cx. Enables: cooperative cancellation of blocked terminal reads, deadline enforcement on writes, deterministic testing of terminal I/O via FrankenLab. TRACING: span 'terminal.io' with fields: op_type, cx_deadline_remaining_us, cx_cancelled. LOG: WARN if I/O exceeds Cx deadline. METRICS: histogram terminal_io_duration_us{op=read|write|flush}.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:08:26.015488408Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T17:40:48.900570646Z","closed_at":"2026-02-14T17:40:48.900545439Z","close_reason":"Implemented Cx-aware variants for all Ring 1 TerminalSession I/O methods: poll_event_cx, read_event_cx, show_cursor_cx, hide_cursor_cx, set_mouse_capture_cx, size_cx, flush_cx. Each emits tracing span 'terminal.io' with op_type/cx_deadline_remaining_us/cx_cancelled fields. Added terminal_io_{read,write,flush}_stats() metric accessors. 10 new tests. All quality gates pass (fmt, clippy, 1110+24 tests).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cross-crate","cx","ring1","terminal-io"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.18","depends_on_id":"bd-1q5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1q5.18","depends_on_id":"bd-ehk.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:56Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3ky.9","title":"Implement Unicode text search","description":"# Implement Unicode-aware text search (optional)

## Objective
Provide optional search utilities for text views/editors, including normalization-aware and case-folded search.

Phase 7 extra; feature-gated.

## Scope
- Exact substring search
- Case-insensitive search (Unicode case folding, if enabled)
- Optional: normalization-aware search

## Tests Required
- Unit tests for:
  - exact search
  - overlapping matches
  - case-fold behavior
- Property tests to ensure returned ranges are valid.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Search returns correct ranges and never panics on arbitrary input.
- [ ] Optional normalization/case-fold behavior is explicit and tested.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-31T23:02:05.877682695Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-02T01:18:10.692127351Z","closed_at":"2026-02-02T01:18:10.692044465Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ky.9","depends_on_id":"bd-10i.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:18Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ky.9","depends_on_id":"bd-3ky.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:18Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ky.9","depends_on_id":"bd-6e9.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-03T14:32:18Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":444,"issue_id":"bd-3ky.9","author":"ubuntu","text":"Reopened: User requested reopening; reverting prior closure.","created_at":"2026-01-31T23:34:20Z"}]}

All have name/kind/complexity/tags/features/edge_cases/source metadata.","created_at":"2026-02-05T15:15:59Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3l9qr","title":"epic(graveyard-§14.9): Seqlocks for Read-Heavy Config and Theme Data","description":"Seqlocks: optimistic reads without locking for theme, config, animation clock. EV=36.0 (Tier S). CONSTRAINT: #![forbid(unsafe_code)] — MUST use an existing safe crate (arc-swap, left-right, or seqlock crate) rather than hand-rolling UnsafeCell-based seqlock. Readers optimistically read snapshot; writer atomically swaps. Best for read-99%/write-1% data. Apply to: ResolvedTheme, TerminalCapabilities, global animation clock. Fallback: RwLock. Risk: requires Clone+Send data. Baseline: RwLock/Mutex reads. Crate candidates: arc-swap (ArcSwap<T> for lock-free reads), left-right (double-buffer with read/write handles), seqlock (safe seqlock wrapper).

**User Value:** Enables lock-free theme and config reads, so multi-threaded apps never block the render loop when reading shared state.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- arc-swap or left-right crate integrated for ResolvedTheme reads
- Theme reads are wait-free (no mutex contention)
- Correctness tests verify no stale reads under concurrent writes
- No unsafe code
- All existing tests pass","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:15.995116342Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:08:44.822605871Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["graveyard","performance","ring2","sync"]}
-{"id":"bd-3l9qr.1","title":"task(seqlock): Evaluate and integrate safe read-optimized crate (arc-swap/left-right)","description":"Evaluate and integrate a safe seqlock/read-optimized crate. CONSTRAINT: #![forbid(unsafe_code)] — NO UnsafeCell or raw atomics. Candidates: (1) arc-swap: ArcSwap<T> for single-writer/multi-reader, (2) left-right: double-buffer with ReadHandle/WriteHandle, (3) seqlock crate (if it provides safe API). Selection criteria: read latency <50ns, no allocation on read path, T: Clone+Send. Implement wrapper trait ReadOptimized<T> { fn load(&self) -> T; fn store(&mut self, val: T); } to abstract over chosen crate. Include benchmark comparing chosen crate vs RwLock vs Mutex.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:45.734623373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T22:22:43.174333115Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["graveyard","performance","sync"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:45.734623373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Selection criteria: read latency <50ns, no allocation on read path, T: Clone+Send. Implement wrapper trait ReadOptimized<T> { fn load(&self) -> T; fn store(&mut self, val: T); } to abstract over chosen crate. Include benchmark comparing chosen crate vs RwLock vs Mutex.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:45.734623373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T19:11:26.359282732Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["graveyard","performance","sync"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:45.734623373Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3l9qr.2","title":"task(seqlock): Apply SeqLock to ResolvedTheme and TerminalCapabilities","description":"Replace RwLock/Mutex on theme and capability data with SeqLock. These are read >99% of the time. Measure read latency before/after.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:46.154463378Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T22:21:58.511883725Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["graveyard","performance","sync"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:46.154463378Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:21:58.511821037Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3l9qr.3","title":"task(seqlock): Correctness tests for safe read-optimized wrapper","description":"Correctness tests for read-optimized wrapper. (1) Proptest: concurrent read/write never returns torn data — spawn 4 reader threads and 1 writer, verify all reads are valid snapshots. (2) Stress test: 1M reads + 1K writes interleaved, no panics, no torn values. (3) Unit: basic load/store, rapid store succession, read during store returns either old or new (never partial). (4) Benchmark: read latency p50/p99 vs RwLock and Mutex. Note: loom tests NOT needed since we use a safe crate (arc-swap/left-right), but we DO need to verify our wrapper's correctness.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:46.568286489Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T22:23:11.025486793Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["graveyard","sync","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T21:47:46.568286489Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:21:58.938173080Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3l9qr.4","title":"task(e2e): E2E test suite for Seqlocks/ArcSwap Concurrent Reads","description":"## E2E Integration Test: Seqlocks/ArcSwap (EV=36)

### Scope
Full integration test exercising rapid theme switching under concurrent reader threads using arc-swap/left-right for read-heavy config and theme data. Validates no torn reads occur and measures read latency.

### Test Scenario
1. Initialize FrankenTUI with ArcSwap-backed ResolvedTheme and TerminalCapabilities.
2. Spawn 8 reader threads continuously reading theme data while rendering.
3. Writer thread switches themes every 50ms (rapid cycling through 10 themes).
4. Run for 5 seconds (100 theme switches).
5. Each reader logs every read with latency and whether data was consistent.
6. Verify no reader ever observes a torn/partial theme (all fields from same generation).
7. Render frames during switching and verify visual consistency.

### JSONL Structured Logging Specification
Reader events:
```json
{
  "event": "seqlock_read",
  "ts_ns": u64,
  "reader_id": u8,
  "theme_generation": u64,
  "read_latency_ns": u64,
  "retry_count": u32,
  "consistent": bool,
  "fields_snapshot": "hash_string"
}
```
Writer events:
```json
{
  "event": "seqlock_write",
  "ts_ns": u64,
  "old_generation": u64,
  "new_generation": u64,
  "theme_name": "string",
  "write_latency_ns": u64
}
```

### Success Criteria
- Zero torn reads: consistent == true for every reader event.
- Read latency p99 < 1us (lock-free reads should be fast).
- All theme switches complete without blocking readers.
- retry_count is low (< 3 on average for seqlock-style reads).
- No panics, no unsafe code (#![forbid(unsafe_code)]).
- JSONL logs are schema-compliant and parseable.
- No deadlocks or livelocks under sustained concurrent access.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:24:18.258280431Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T22:26:58.856233468Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","logging","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:24:18.258280431Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3l9qr.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3l9qr.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:26:58.856191429Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
